task_objective: fix: Honor --format override regardless of output extension
design_decisions: Modified the CLI to directly call report.to_json() or report.to_html() based on the output_format variable.
Removed the automatic appending of .json to output filenames to respect explicit user intent.
Bypassed report.to_file() in the CLI to avoid its extension-based format inference when --format is provided.
results: The --format CLI flag now strictly overrides output file extensions, ensuring user intent is always honored.
